tasks.label: Kill Port 3001
tasks.command: try { $r = netstat -aon | Select-String ':3001\s+.*LISTENING'; if ($r) { $pids = ($r | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] } | Sort-Object -Unique); foreach ($p in $pids) { if ($p -match '^\d+$' -and $p -ne '0') { taskkill /PID $p /T /F 2>$null; Write-Host "Killed PID: $p" } } } else { Write-Host 'Port 3001 is free' } } catch { Write-Host 'Port 3001 was already free' }

windows.command: try { $r = netstat -aon | Select-String ':3001\s+.*LISTENING'; if ($r) { $pids = ($r | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] } | Sort-Object -Unique); foreach ($p in $pids) { if ($p -match '^\d+$' -and $p -ne '0') { taskkill /PID $p /T /F 2>$null; Write-Host "Killed PID: $p" } } } else { Write-Host 'Port 3001 is free' } } catch { Write-Host 'Port 3001 was already free' }
